ead.archdesc:
======= RMA00248Maurice C. Bond papers21-24-248Compiled by M. Warren, B. HuthDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections

converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Maurice C. Bond papers
Bond, M. C. (Maurice Chester), 1897-1993.
21-24-248
9.2 cubic feet. 9.2 cubic feet.
1912-1980. Reports, notes, journals, photograph album, mimeographed material, correspondence, memoranda, minutes, office calendars, desk and field notes, travel accounts, diaries, logs of trips, and other papers. Reports; mimeographed and printed material from Agricultural Economics Extension files on subjects such as cooperatives, farm management, and marketing; articles and speeches on extension work; notes, journals, photograph album, mimeographed material, correspondence, memoranda, and minutes of various conferences, workshops, and committees; reports of the Los Baños Project in the Philippines (1963); office calendars, desk and field notes, travel accounts, and diaries; logs of trips to Germany, England, and Mexico; papers relating to Epsilon Sigma Phi, an honorary extension fraternity; and correspondence, notes, and other records pertaining to local organizations including the Ithaca Cooperative Consumers' Society Inc. and First Congregational Church of Ithaca (New York). Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 15 16 ======= 15 16 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 2100820
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
M. Warren, B. Huth
Date completed:
January 1987
EAD encoding:
Martin Heggestad, July 2003
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Professor of marketing.
Maurice C. Bond (Cornell University Ph.D. 1928) taught marketing and was Director of Extension, Cornell University.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Reports; mimeographed and printed material from Agricultural Economics Extension files on subjects such as cooperatives, farm management, and marketing; articles and speeches on extension work; notes, journals, photograph album, mimeographed material, correspondence, memoranda, and minutes of various conferences, workshops, and committees; reports of the Los Baños Project in the Philippines (1963); color slides of the Cornell-University of the Philippines ICA project (1956-67); office calendars, desk and field notes, travel accounts, and diaries; logs of trips to Germany, England, and Mexico; papers relating to Epsilon Sigma Phi, an honorary extension fraternity; and correspondence, notes, and other records pertaining to local organizations including the Ithaca Cooperative Consumers' Society Inc. and First Congregational Church of Ithaca (New York).
Cite As:
Maurice Chester Bond papers, #21-24-248. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Photographs. Field notes Los Baños (Philippines) Mexico -- Description and travel. Germany -- Description and travel. Great Britain -- Description and travel. Voyages and travels. College teachers -- New York (State) -- Ithaca. Farm produce -- Marketing. Farm management. Cooperative societies. Agricultural extension work. Cornell University. Cooperative Extension Epsilon Sigma Phi First Congregational Church of Ithaca Ithaca Cooperative Consumers\' Society
